blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
